name: release-doctor
description: A lightweight CLI that detects npm package release blockers before publish.

scripts.lint: node --check ./bin/release-doctor.js && node --check ./src/cli.js && node --check ./src/fs.js && node --check ./src/index.js && node --check ./src/report.js && node --check ./test/release-doctor.test.js
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && node ./bin/release-doctor.js --strict .

author: Release Doctor contributors
